/X:MINUTE ORDER AMENDED ON 6-17-22/TWS/CH2:ISS:CPROB:PROB 1 Y:PJ 76D/CTS:38/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/SUSFF/CTORD:RESTITUTION RESERVED/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM3/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL ABIDE BY STAY AWAY ORDERS ISSUED ON 5-11- 22:COURTNEY GAIL BURPEE CLEMENS, ISAIAH L,, AND 285 TURK STREET/VD:TRIAL DATE/
/CAL:JOIN 22004539/X:AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING VIA ZOOM,/TEXT:DEFT ADV& PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL:TO JOIN #22004539 (PAROLE)/X:DA & PAROLE AGENT ROBERT ABAKAN APPEARING VIA ZOOM/ORNAS/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SUBMIT TO DRUG TEST WHEN DIRECTED TO DO SO BY SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE/WEAP/X:NOT CONSUME ANY ALCOHOL OR MARIJUANA/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA1:COURTNEY GAIL BURPEE-CLEMONS/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD:STATUS SAN MATEO COUNTY, POTN DISPO OR TS PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE AND ADDITIONAL TERMS OF RELEASE/X:BENJAMIN LUKE SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR CLEMENTE GONZALEZ,/SHER/SHER2:05-10-22/BAIL:5,000//CONTD:CUSTODY STATUS AND STATUS OF PAROLE CASE/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/GTWM/ORNAS/X:AS A CONDITIONOF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO//CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICEON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SAORD/SA1:COURTNEY GAIL BURPEE-CLEMONS AND ISIAH L/SA2:285 TURK STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA/SAORD3/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE & ADDITIONAL TERMS OF RELEASE/DOP/
/CAL:TO ADDRESS RELEASE/X: PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING/X:PAROLE CASE MANAGER CHARLES BROWN IS PRESENT,/CONT/
/CAL:CUSTODY STATUS & STATUS OF PAROLE CASE 22004539/NTW/LD:07-01-22 (30TH DAY)/CONTD:TO JOIN 22004539 ON 06-02-22/CONTD:TRIAL ON 06-17-22/DOP/
/CAL:/X:STATE PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR PRESENT IN COURT/X:DA APPEARING VIA ZOOM/X:DATE OF 06-01-22 M50 CONFIRMED/CONT/DOP/
